project.description: Build automático de Turismo App (Android APK)

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
export ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/36.0.0:$PATH
cd /workspace/turismo-android
echo "" echo "====================================" echo " TURISMO ANDROID - BUILD PIPELINE" echo "====================================" echo ""
echo "[1/3] Cleaning old builds..." rm -rf app/build/outputs
echo "" echo "[2/3] Building Android APK..." ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1
echo "" echo "[3/3] Verifying APK..." if [ -f app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ]; then echo "SUCCESS: APK generated" ls -lh app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk else echo "WARNING: APK not found, checking build dir..." find app/build -name "*.apk" -type f 2>/dev/null fi
echo "" echo "====================================" echo " BUILD COMPLETED" echo "===================================="
